Othor can be found at Minlos in eastern Upper Lebennin. You have successfully defended Arnach from attack and should now speak to Othor.
Lady Terenis can be found in her hall in Tumladen. Othor has asked you to return to Lady Terenis and warn her of the Haradrim forces readying to cross…
